twitter_thread: We saved $120k/yr by ditching Bloomberg terminals for Quandl and Alpha Vantage.
Quandl's free plan covers 500,000 financial instruments. Enough for most teams.
Zipline backtested our trading strategy 10x faster than a $5k/month platform.
90% of 'black box' trading platforms use the same 3 algorithms. Don't overpay.
Grafana dashboards help us spot market trends 2 hours before competitors.
What's the cheapest yet effective tool you've found for finance teams? #competitiveplay #financetechnology
pack.linkedin: By replacing Bloomberg terminals with Quandl and Alpha Vantage, we cut $120k from our annual software budget. Zipline's backtesting platform also outperformed a $5k/month competitor, giving us a 10x speed boost. We've built a custom Grafana dashboard to visualize market data, gaining a 2-hour edge over competitors. How have you optimized your finance team's software expenses to stay competitive?
tiktok_hooks: I used to pay $5k a month for software, now I pay $50
Free tools that will make your finance team faster
pack.reddit_headline: Can open-source software replace $100k+ finance platforms?
